seo.title: BC Fabrication | Metal & Composite Side Gates and Driveway Gates
seo.description: BC Fabrication supplies bespoke metal and composite side gates and driveway gates across the UK. Request a quote online.
seo.keywords: metal side gates, composite side gates, driveway gates, composite driveway gates, bespoke gates

hero.title: Bespoke side gates and driveway gates built to suit your property
hero.text: BC Fabrication designs and fabricates made-to-measure metal and composite gates for homes across the UK. We build high-quality bespoke gates with a clean, modern finish.

services_intro.title: Made-to-measure gates for side access and driveways
services_intro.text: We specialise in secure, low-maintenance gate systems in metal and composite finishes for modern homes and properties.

services.title: Metal side gates
services.text: Strong fabricated side gates designed for security and everyday use.

services.title: Composite side gates
services.text: Low-maintenance side gates with a modern look and added privacy.

services.title: Driveway gates
services.text: Made-to-measure driveway gates in metal or composite for kerb appeal and durability.

services.title: Powder-coated finishes
services.text: Clean, durable finishes designed to last and complement modern properties.

services.title: Bespoke fabrication
services.text: Every gate is built around your required sizes and preferred style.

services.title: UK-wide enquiries
services.text: Serving customers across the UK from our base in Bolton.

gallery_intro.title: Real BC Fabrication work
gallery_intro.text: A selection of side gate and driveway gate installations. Click any image to enlarge it.

trust.title: Clean fabrication. Strong finishes. Real project photos.

items.title: Made to measure
items.text: Built to your exact opening and layout.

items.title: Professional look
items.text: Modern frames and composite finishes that suit contemporary homes.

items.title: Easy quoting
items.text: Send your sizes and requirements through the enquiry form.
